headline: Zillow Realtor Listing Share Puts Spotlight On News Digital Real Estate
summary: Zillow and Realtor.com have agreed to share pre market "Preview" residential listings across both platforms. The collaboration is aimed at giving home buyers and sellers broader visibility into upcoming listings before they officially hit the market. The move is material for News (NasdaqGS:NWSA), which owns Realtor.com, as it may influence traffic, listing exposure, and competitive position in online real estate. For News, which trades at around $26.2 per share, digital real estate is an...
